---
title: "Welcome"
comments: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html: 
    margin-top: 0em
    margin-bottom: 0em
aliases:
  - /about
---

Hello. Welcome to my personal website!

I am a doctoral researcher at the [Cluster of Excellence SimTech](https://www.simtech.uni-stuttgart.de) at the University of Stuttgart and a research assistant at [TU Dortmund](https://statistik.tu-dortmund.de). My supervisor is [Prof. Dr. Paul Bürkner](https://paul-buerkner.github.io). Before, I studied a Master's degree in Probability and Statistics at the Center for Research in Mathematics [CIMAT](https://www.cimat.mx) in Guanajuato, Mexico, under the supervision of [Dr. Andrés Christen](https://www.cimat.mx/~jac/).

I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Bayesian Computation, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.

Be sure to [contact me](mailto:javier.aguilarr@icloud.com) if you ever want to work together or if you have doubts or comments about my work.
